scripts.test: echo '⚠️  Direct test execution is disabled due to timeout issues. Please use: npm run test:unit, test:integration:1/2/3, or test:e2e' && exit 1
scripts.test:unit:
echo '⚠️  Unit tests timeout frequently. Use alternatives:

# 1. Quick test - basic functionality (~30s)
npm run test:quick

# 2. Integration tests - split execution (~40s each)
npm run test:integration:1  # basic-aggregates, daemon, edge-cases
npm run test:integration:2  # find-detection, move-detection
npm run test:integration:3  # restore-detection, startup-delete, statistics

# 3. E2E tests only (~1min)
npm run test:e2e' && exit 1
scripts.test:integration: echo '⚠️  Direct integration test execution is disabled due to timeout issues. Please use: npm run test:integration:1, test:integration:2, or test:integration:3' && exit 1
